arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Jarell Quansah 'loan decision made' ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly make a decision over whether they are prepared to loan out Jarell Quansah during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports Drop Big Update on Alexander-Arnold Leaving Liverpool for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool are yet to reach an agreement with defender Trent Alexander-Arnold over a new contract.

arts.ttl: PSG 'injustice', French media reaction, Luis Enrique's game plan amid Liverpool hope
arts.sum: The Reds host PSG at Anfield this evening with a 1-0 lead from the Parc des Princes

arts.ttl: Arsenal will ‘carry on fighting’ as Liverpool run away with Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says Arsenal keep fighting to win every game even as the Premier League title slips out of view. The Gunners dropped more points at the weekend, drawing 1-1 with Manchester United at Old Trafford, leaving them 15 points behind leaders Liverpool, who beat Southampton 3-1 at home. Having exited both domestics […] The post Arsenal will ‘carry on fighting’ as Liverpool run away with Premier League title first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups ahead of second leg at Anfield
arts.sum: The Reds take a 1-0 lead back to Anfield but still face a huge test against the French champions

arts.ttl: Liverpool star Mo Salah ‘has offered himself’ to Barcelona
arts.sum: Liverpool talisman Mohamed Salah has offered his services up to the brass at La Liga giants Barcelona. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Tuesday provided an insight into…

arts.ttl: Arne Slot touchline ban labelled 'a disgrace' as 'nonsense' referee report slammed
arts.sum: Arne Slot has now served his two-match touchline ban following his heated rant at Michael Oliver at the end of February's fiery Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot 'approves' £38m signing of Premier League star
arts.sum: Arne Slot reportedly gives the green light for Liverpool to complete the signing of a £38m-rated Premier League star this summer.
